visual_description: In a dimly lit, green-hued room, likely a restaurant or bar, a man in a blue patterned short-sleeve shirt sits at a table, smiling and gesturing with a pen as he speaks to another man in a black leather jacket. The man in the leather jacket listens intently, his gaze fixed on the speaker. In the background, other figures are visible, one of whom appears to be holding a phone.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese with a conversational tone, followed by a loud, sustained electronic buzzer sound.
